creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
pav         2007-06-16 12:15:27 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    net-mgmt             Makefile 
  Added files:
    net-mgmt/gsnmp       Makefile distinfo pkg-descr pkg-plist 
  Log:
  A SNMP library built on top of glib2 and gnet2.  The goal of the project is to
  provide an efficient, clean, portable implementation of an SNMP stack for
  management applications.
  
  WWW: https://trac.eecs.iu-bremen.de/projects/gsnmp/
  
  PR:             ports/113511
  Submitted by:   Matt Peterson <matt@peterson.org>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.123     +1 -0      ports/net-mgmt/Makefile
  1.1       +25 -0     ports/net-mgmt/gsnmp/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +3 -0      ports/net-mgmt/gsnmp/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +5 -0      ports/net-mgmt/gsnmp/pkg-descr (new)
  1.1       +17 -0     ports/net-mgmt/gsnmp/pkg-plist (new)
